name: tarhib

scripts.generate:mobile-api: npm run export:openapi -w apps/backend && docker run --rm -v "%CD%:/local" openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i /local/apps/backend/openapi/openapi.json -g dart-dio -o /local/apps/mobile/packages/tarhib_api_client --additional-properties=pubName=tarhib_api_client,nullSafe=true,pubAuthor=Tarhib && cd apps/mobile && flutter pub get

description: Plateforme de gestion de l'hospitalité corporate (commandes, stock, quotas).
